subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in South America | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-4301
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in South America. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-4301. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
